sections.paragraph:
- Original: δεῦτε

- Transliteration: Deute

- Phonetic: dyoo'-teh

- Definition:

1. come hither, come here, come

2. interjection, come!, come now!

- Origin: from G1204 and an imperative form of eimi (to go)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G1204 and an imperative of εἶμι eimi (to go); come hither!: - come X follow.
